# Unlumen UI

> Unlumen UI is an animated React component library built with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Motion. Components are distributed via the shadcn CLI and can be installed directly into your project.

## Documentation
- [Installation](https://ui.unlumen.com/docs/installation): How to set up and install components
- [UI Components](https://ui.unlumen.com/docs/ui): Full list of animated UI primitives
- [Component Gallery](https://ui.unlumen.com/components): All free and pro components
- [Pricing](https://ui.unlumen.com/pricing): Pro plan with lifetime access

## About
Built by Léo (Unlumen). Open-source components are free; pro components require a one-time purchase.
